usage: add_gui_shape [-help] [-layer <layerName>] [-name <guiShapeName>] [-width <width>] {-rect {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -line {x1 y1 x2 y2 ...} | -polygon {x1 y1 x2 y2 ...}} [ -line {x1 y1 x2 y2 ...} [-arrow ] ]

options.name: -arrow
options.description: Draw arrow in the middle of the line with direction from start point to end point

options.name: -layer
options.description: GUI layer name to use or create for the rect/line. If the specified layer does not exist, it will be automatically created the name as guiShapeLayer.

options.name: -line
options.description: The beginning and ending coordinates for the line segments (values are in microns)

options.name: -name
options.description: The name of the GUI shape

options.name: -polygon
options.description: The coordinates for the polygon segment (values are in microns)

options.name: -rect
options.description: Coordinates of the lower-left and upper-right points of the rectangle (values are in microns)

options.name: -width
options.description: Number of pixels in the border of the object
